untranslatable_reason: This pairs trading strategy requires multi-asset cointegration analysis, spread calculation between two price series, and stationarity testing. These operations require: (1) access to multiple asset price series simultaneously, (2) cointegration coefficient estimation, (3) spread series construction and mean/standard deviation tracking, (4) ADF or similar stationarity tests. The backtest engine structure supports only single-asset technical indicators from the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. Pairs trading requires cross-asset portfolio construction logic that is not expressible through the available single-asset indicator set and basic comparison operators.
translation_notes: Signal requires: cointegration detection between two assets, spread mean-reversion mechanics, and dynamic capital allocation ratios. These are multi-asset portfolio operations outside the scope of single-asset technical indicator rules. The 'AUTHOR_SILENT' parameters (lookback_period, threshold, half_life) would be essential for operationalizing this strategy but were not provided. Recommend implementing this as a custom multi-asset strategy module rather than a single-asset rules engine.
